history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, curly hair stands in front of a brick building with a distinctive green-trimmed roof. He's wearing a black hoodie and dark pants, with one hand in his pocket, exuding a casual, relaxed pose. The building has a rustic charm, featuring a wooden entrance with a ceiling fan mounted above it. A sign on the brick wall reads "Queen's Court Jallong Boutique Resort". To the left of the man, a small, bushy green plant adds a touch of nature to the scene. The roof is a striking element, with its green, intricately carved eaves and yellowish-green metal sheeting. The lighting suggests it's daytime, with clear blue skies and sunlight casting shadows, highlighting the textures of the brick and wood. The overall mood is serene and inviting, with a touch of natural beauty.
